sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns: I'm doing pretty good, thanks for asking. How about you?
I'm doing well, thank you. So, what kind of music do you enjoy listening to?
I really like indie and alternative music. Some of my favorite bands include Tame Impala, Fleet Foxes, and The 1975. How about you?

I also enjoy indie and alternative music, but some of my favorite artists are Lorde, Haim, and St. Vincent. It seems like we both have a similar taste in music. Have you heard of any new artists or bands that you think I should check out?

Actually, I recently discovered a new artist named Phoebe Bridgers and I think she's really talented. Her music is a mix of indie and folk, and I think you might like her. Have you listened to her before?
No, I haven't listened to her before, but I'll definitely check her out. Thanks for the recommendation! Do you have any favorite albums or songs that you'd recommend?

One of my favorite albums is "Innerspeaker" by Tame Impala. It's a great album to listen to from start to finish, and I think you'll really enjoy it. Another favorite song of mine is "Cherry Wine" by the band "Bon Iver". It's a really beautiful song, and I think you'll like it.
Thanks for the recommendations! I'll definitely check out "Innerspeaker" and "Cherry Wine". What's your favorite concert that you've been to?

My favorite concert that I've been to was a Tame Impala concert a few years ago. The energy of the crowd and the band's performance was incredible. I also really enjoyed the opener, a band called "Apricot Jam". Have you been to any concerts recently?
I haven't been to any concerts recently due to the pandemic, but I'm really looking forward to going to a concert again once it's safe to do so. Have you listened to any new music releases lately?

Yes, I recently listened to the new album by the band "The 1975" called "Notes on a Conditional Form". I think it's a really great album, and I've been listening to it non-stop. What about you? Have you listened to any new releases lately?

I recently listened to the new album by the artist "FKA twigs" called "Caprisongs". It's a really unique and interesting album that I enjoyed listening to. Have you heard of any new artists or bands that you think I should check out?
Yes, I recently discovered a new artist named Arlo Parks and I think she's really talented. Her music is a mix of indie, pop, and R&B, and I think you might like her. Have you listened to her before?
No, I haven't listened to her before, but I'll definitely check her out. Thanks for the recommendation! Do you have any upcoming concert plans?

Unfortunately, I don't have any upcoming concert plans due to the pandemic. I'm really looking forward to going to concerts again once it's safe to do so. In the meantime, I've been listening to a lot of live music on streaming platforms like YouTube and NPR Music. Have you checked out any live music online recently?

Yes, I've been listening to a lot of live music online recently. I recently watched a live concert by the band "Haim" on YouTube, and it was really great. They have such a great energy and their music is so fun to listen to live. Have you ever been to a virtual concert?

Yes, I've been to a few virtual concerts recently. While it's not the same as being at an in-person concert, it's still a great way to experience live music. I recently watched a virtual concert by the band "The National" and it was really well done. How about you? Have you been to any virtual concerts recently?

I haven't been to any virtual concerts recently, but I've been listening to a lot of live music on streaming platforms like YouTube and NPR Music. I think it's a great way to experience live music while we're all still social distancing. What's your favorite music festival that you've been to?

My favorite music festival that I've been to was Coachella. The atmosphere was incredible, and I got to see so many great artists perform. I also really enjoyed the food and art installations that were there. Have you been to any music festivals recently?

I haven't been to any music festivals recently due to the pandemic, but I'm really looking forward to going to a music festival again once it's safe to do so. What's your favorite way to discover new music?

My favorite way to discover new music is through music blogs and online music publications as well. I also like to listen to music podcasts and watch music videos on YouTube. Sometimes, I also like to ask my friends for recommendations, as they often have great taste in music.

That's great! It's always fun to discover new music through different sources. And asking friends for recommendations is also a great way to find new artists you might enjoy. Do you have any favorite music blogs or online music publications that you like to read?

Those are some great music blogs and websites! I also enjoy reading Pitchfork and Stereogum, and I've been reading more on The Fader recently as well. NPR Music is also a great source for music news and reviews. Have you listened to any new music releases lately that you've discovered through these sources?

Arlo Parks and Hayes and Y's are both really great artists! I've been listening to Arlo Parks' album a lot lately, and I think Hayes and Y's has a lot of potential. Have you had a chance to see them perform live yet?

Yes, live music online is a great way to experience music while we're all still social distancing. I've been watching a lot of live performances on YouTube and other platforms. Have you seen any particular performances that you enjoyed recently?
